message: Abnormal port scan activity detected from external network; high volume attempts on ports 443 and 3389.
CPU usage has been over 92 percent for 15 minutes; application queue latency is increasing.
Unexpected high volume outbound traffic to foreign country detected; potential data leak should be investigated.
Database disk usage reached 86 percent; log archiving policy should be checked.
5 failed MFA attempts from the same user account; possible unauthorized access attempt.
Unexpected MAC address change detected on switch port; physical network access should be verified.
Signature-based attack detection: possible SQL injection payloads repeatedly seen in web application traffic.
